layoff_trend_2025_2026: Mixed: TCS cut 12,000+ in 2025 and startup layoffs ~20-25k nationally, but Bengaluru hiring activity still +23% YoY in early 2026 driven by GCC and AI demand
sources: Zomato CEO Deepinder Goyal disclosure: avg EPH ₹102 in 2025 (gross), ~₹81 net after 20% fuel/maintenance
Numbeo Cost of Living Index May 2026 (Bangalore baseline 20.3)
Taggd / foundit Insights Tracker 2026 (Bengaluru +23% YoY hiring)
Naukri JobSpeak hiring calendar (Jan-Mar peak post-appraisal, Sep-Oct secondary)

layoff_trend_2025_2026: Lower exposure than Bengaluru; IT services layoffs (TCS, Infosys) hit Chennai workforce but manufacturing/EV expansion offsetting. Net direction: roughly flat to slightly positive
sources: Zomato 2025 EPH disclosure (used as national anchor; Chennai discounted ~10% vs Bengaluru per fare structure)
Numbeo Cost of Living Chennai May 2026 (18.7)

layoff_trend_2025_2026: Positive: fastest-growing Tier-1 GCC city YoY. Eli Lilly +1,500 jobs, Sanofi scaling to 2,600, BMS & Amgen expansion. Hiring activity +21% YoY
sources: Flexiple GCC list Hyderabad 2026, Taggd pharma hiring trends 2026

layoff_trend_2025_2026: Mixed: Edtech (Byju's, Unacademy) and consumer-services layoffs hit NCR hardest in 2025; offset by GCC and consulting expansion. Net: slight negative to flat
sources: Zomato 2025 EPH disclosure (NCR fares ~5-8% above national avg)
Inc42 Layoff Tracker 2025 (edtech most-affected sector, NCR-heavy)
Flexiple GCC NCR list 2026, Taggd India job hotspots 2026

layoff_trend_2025_2026: Relatively resilient: BFSI hiring strong, fintech mixed. Hiring activity +22% YoY in early 2026. Media/advertising recovery offsetting startup cuts
sources: Business Standard 2025 (Mumbai auto driver case studies: ₹500-600/day net after CNG + ₹150 permit at 10 hrs)
Zomato 2025 EPH ₹102 gross (Mumbai surge ~10-15% above avg per metro fare structure)
Numbeo Mumbai May 2026 (24.4, highest in India)
